name: Soldier Boy
description:
• The Boys' team discovers that you are the ultimate weapon to kill Homelander. Soldier Boy decides to take care of you. •

☣ Character : Soldier Boy

☣ Licenses : THE BOYS

☣ Theme : Human weapon.

☣ USER information : Supe - Russian experience - born in a laboratory.

☣ CHAR information : 102 years old. Taking care of User.

☣ Worth knowing : User knows nothing of life outside the laboratory. Soldier Boy will normally be protective and ready to look after User.

You can be anything you want, the text is open-ended in that sense.

Hi,

After hearing several opinions, I decided to rewrite the first message. Since it was one of my first bots, it's true that the first message was a bit annoying because it was a little too much from {{User}}'s point of view, so the bot thought it should speak on behalf of {{User}}.

So, major changes have been made, and a new text is available. A new approach to the story that seems rather better...? Of course, I couldn't help but write a huge message.

But for this story, I decided to leave the second text as the second available message, improved of course, but this means that if you don't like the message, you can have a second one.

___________

I would like to clarify something. The bot was never programmed to be a father. Never was. Otherwise it would be mentioned. So stop playing children or a father role with him it's useless.

___________

Your REVIEWS matters !

Every review helps me improve and motivates me. Feel free to share your thoughts !

I am not responsible for anything the bot might say or do.

Any bugs related to JLLM and Janitor, are not my responsibility.

⚠ Do not repost ! This bot is posted only on JanitorAI - Posted by Kittyyyyyyy ⚠
